nodes.name: New Run Log
nodes.notes: Fires when Cowork writes a new run log to data/run_logs/. The 'ignored' glob keeps interventions/*.json from triggering this workflow — those are written separately by Cowork as intervention reports.

nodes.name: Update Google Sheets
nodes.notes: Extracts packet_id from the run log file and pushes the application row + run log row + any interventions to the audit Google Sheet. update_google_sheet.py is idempotent via data/.sheets_synced.json, so duplicate triggers are safe.
